title: FloppyCraft
description: FloppyCraft is a Minecraft modpack that allows you to automate every aspect of the game through programming with the CC: Tweaked mod.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b202eb149b725f4cd526d1b51465672ccf0a38a_0.webp)


**FloppyCraft**: The Future of Minecraft Automation 
Step into a world where programming and automation define your gaming experience! 

FloppyCraft is a revolutionary modpack designed for Minecraft enthusiasts who want to transform every action into an automated task. 🚀 At the heart of the adventure, the CC: Tweaked mod allows you to code and program machines, systems, and processes to smoothly and effortlessly advance your world.

With FloppyCraft, every aspect of your adventure becomes programmable. Create automation networks with computers, robots, and much more. Automate your farms, manage complex machines, and let your Minecraft world run without ever lifting a finger.

## **Features:**
- **Total Automation:** Program and automate everything, from farms to storage systems. 
- **Powerful Modding:** Use the CC: Tweaked mod to code directly in Minecraft. 
- **Technical Challenges:** Solve programming puzzles to create even more efficient systems. 
- **Minecraft Aesthetics:** A pixelated world in the image of Minecraft, where technology and exploration meet.

FloppyCraft is much more than just a modpack. It's a challenge for aspiring programmers and engineers who want to push the boundaries of the game and discover a new universe of automation in Minecraft!
